name: GREENLIT VENTURES INC.
summary: PART I Background Corporate History and General Information Greenlit Ventures Inc. (formerly MS Young Adventure Enterprise, Inc, AllyMe Holding Inc, and Rain Sound Acquisition Corporation) (the Company or Greenlit) was incorporated on December 7, 2016 under the laws of the state of Delaware. The Company engages in consulting services. On November 13, 2017, the Company changed of the Companys name to AllyMe Holding Inc.
